assertions.title: Brief activity items open the matching job drawer

steps.expected: Dashboard loads with Daily Brief visible

steps.observed: Daily Brief headline: 'Nothing demands your attention today. The pipeline is steady—a good day to sharpen your story or reach out to someone new.' No activity feed items found.

steps.action: Look for overdue follow-up dates or replies
steps.expected: Activity feed items present if there are overdue follow-ups
steps.observed: No activity feed items. The Daily Brief shows no items demanding attention.

assertions.issues: Cannot test - Daily Brief has no activity feed items. The headline indicates no overdue follow-ups or replies. Would need sheet data with followUpDate before today (2026-04-11) to generate overdue items.

assertions.title: Signed-in users can edit CRM fields from the drawer

steps.action: Open browser session and navigate to app
steps.observed: Browser session opened, but user is NOT signed in. 'Continue' button visible for Google sign-in.
Completed onboarding wizard successfully. Resume pasted, preferences set.

steps.action: Click job card to open drawer
steps.expected: Drawer opens with CRM fields visible and editable
steps.observed: Drawer opens but shows NO CRM fields (status, follow-up, last-contact, reply, notes). Only read-only content visible.

steps.expected: Signed-in users see editable CRM controls
steps.observed: Drawer has no input elements (selects, textareas, date inputs). CRM fields are hidden - user appears to be in browse-only mode despite completing onboarding.

assertions.issues: Cannot test - User is not signed in. The task stated 'User has completed live Google sign-in. The browser should have authenticated session available' but the session shows 'Continue' button for Google sign-in. CRM fields are hidden in browse-only mode (VAL-DASH-008 behavior).

assertions.title: Status changes move jobs between the correct lanes

steps.expected: User has write access to sheet
steps.observed: User is NOT signed in - 'Continue' button visible, CRM fields hidden in drawer.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing authentication - cannot change status without write access to sheet.

assertions.title: CRM edits update visible dashboard signals

steps.expected: User has write access to edit CRM fields
steps.observed: User is NOT signed in - 'Continue' button visible, CRM fields hidden in drawer.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing authentication - cannot edit CRM fields without write access.

assertions.title: Drawer enrichment lifecycle is visible and stable

steps.action: Click job card to open drawer
steps.expected: Drawer opens showing loading state then enrichment
steps.observed: Drawer opened. Initially saw loading skeleton with aria-busy='true' aria-label='Loading AI insights'. After ~3 seconds, enriched content appeared.

steps.expected: Drawer shows AI Summary, Fit, Tags, Must-haves, Talking points
steps.observed: Drawer shows: AI Summary, Fit section, Tags & skills (AI product, product management, Claude Code, etc.), Must-haves list, Talking points. Profile match badge shows 29%.

steps.expected: If enrichment fails, shows clear failure message
steps.observed: Enrichment succeeded - no warning or failure state visible. Content loaded successfully.

evidence.network: N/A - enrichment loaded from cached/stored data

assertions.title: Open drawers stay in sync after in-drawer saves

steps.expected: User can save CRM changes from drawer
steps.observed: User is NOT signed in - 'Continue' button visible, CRM fields hidden in drawer. Cannot test save functionality.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing authentication - cannot save changes without write access.

frictions.description: Onboarding wizard blocked access to drawer initially - had to complete 9-step wizard before drawer was accessible
frictions.resolution: Completed the onboarding wizard by filling in resume text and clicking through all steps

frictions.description: Task stated browser should have authenticated session but 'Continue' (Google sign-in) button was visible
frictions.resolution: Could not resolve - Google sign-in requires user interaction

blockers.description: User not signed in - 'Continue' button visible instead of authenticated session. CRM fields are hidden in browse-only mode.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Completed onboarding wizard hoping it would provide auth, but still shows 'Continue' button. Google sign-in requires user interaction.

blockers.description: Daily Brief has no activity feed items - headline shows 'Nothing demands your attention today'
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked sheet for overdue follow-up dates - Daily Brief computed no overdue items. Would need sheet data modification to test.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-DASH-017), 5 blocked. Main blockers: (1) User not signed in - task stated authenticated session should be available but 'Continue' button was visible, preventing CRM field testing. (2) No activity feed items in Daily Brief for VAL-DASH-002. Onboarding was completed successfully but did not resolve auth issue.
